ddls:
CREATE TABLE "clothing_sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_label" TEXT /* The common size label (e.g., XXS, XS, S, M, L) */,
  "nl_de" INTEGER /* Size equivalent in the Netherlands and Germany */,
  "scan" INTEGER /* Size equivalent in Scandinavia */,
  "fr_be" INTEGER /* Size equivalent in France and Belgium */,
  "uk" INTEGER /* Size equivalent in the United Kingdom */,
  "us" INTEGER /* Size equivalent in the United States */,
  "size_type" TEXT /* Type of clothing size (e.g., tops, bottoms, dresses) */,
  "size_conversion_formula" TEXT /* Formula used to convert sizes between regions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "style_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the style of clothing */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the clothing size */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the clothing item in stock */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Minimum quantity required to trigger a reorder */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity to be reordered when the inventory level falls below the reorder level */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time of the last inventory update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_style_id FOREIGN KEY ("style_id") REFERENCES styles ("style_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES clothing_sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "styles" (
  "style_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clothing style */,
  "style_name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing style */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the clothing style */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category the style belongs to */,
  "style_description_long" TEXT /* Detailed description of the clothing style */,
  "style_image" TEXT /* Image of the clothing style */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("style_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "category_description_long" TEXT /* Detailed description of the category */,
  "category_image" TEXT /* Image of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the region */,
  "region_code" TEXT /* Unique code representing each region */,
  "tax_rate" REAL /* Tax rate applicable in each region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "style_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the style of clothing sold */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the clothing size sold */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the sale occurred */,
  "quantity_sold" INTEGER /* Quantity of the clothing item sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date when the sale occurred */,
  "sale_channel" TEXT /* Sales channel (e.g., online, in-store, phone order) */,
  "sale_price" REAL /* Price at which the item was sold */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES clothing_sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_style_id FOREIGN KEY ("style_id") REFERENCES styles ("style_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the customer is located */,
  "preferred_size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer's preferred clothing size */,
  "customer_since" TEXT /* Date when the customer first made a purchase */,
  "loyalty_program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the loyalty program (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_preferred_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("preferred_size_id") REFERENCES clothing_sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size recommendation */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer receiving the recommendation */,
  "style_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the style of clothing */,
  "suggested_size_id" INTEGER /* The suggested size for the customer */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region for the size recommendation */,
  "recommendation_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the size recommendation (e.g., based on measurements, purchase history) */,
  "recommended_size_id" INTEGER /* Recommended size for the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_recommendations_style_id FOREIGN KEY ("style_id") REFERENCES styles ("style_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_recommendations_suggested_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("suggested_size_id") REFERENCES clothing_sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_recommendations_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_recommendations_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of measurements */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "chest" REAL /* Chest measurement in inches */,
  "waist" REAL /* Waist measurement in inches */,
  "hips" REAL /* Hips measurement in inches */,
  "height" REAL /* Height in inches */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight in pounds */,
  "measurement_method" TEXT /* Method used to obtain the measurements (e.g., manual input, automated measurement tool) */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date when the measurements were taken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return */,
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the original sale */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the return */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date when the return occurred */,
  "return_reason_code" TEXT /* Standardized code for the return reason */,
  "resolved_date" TEXT /* Date when the return was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_sale_id FOREIGN KEY ("sale_id") REFERENCES sales ("sale_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., store manager, inventory specialist, data analyst) */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region the user is responsible for */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee record (if applicable) */,
  "supervisor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supervisor (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the system was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., view inventory, update sales) */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Detailed information about the actions performed by the user */,
  "ipv4_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
